inline_comments.message: seems like this was deliberately made different from other triggers.  So maybe, possibly, to ensure you don't trigger other jobs listening on the same repository, you will consider using recheck-helm, reverify-helm and verify-helm instead of the (very common) keywords?  Just my $0.02

Thanks for your comments Chris. This had a very specific helm trigger, it was the team who requested this trigger to be more generic (IT-19326)
I added the generic form + left the helm specific trigger to only trigger helm verify

Hello, a lot of people tries "recheck" on OOM repo (and nothing happpens) as they don't know you have to use the specific "verify-helm". 
With that, it'll be better.
Is it just on oom repo that it will happen?
